title: Efossus zacatecasensis
intro: Efossus zacatecasensis, also known as Zacatecan Ephedra, is a type of succulent plant belonging to the Ephedraceae family. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including the reduction of inflammation, improvement of respiratory function, and management of cardiovascular health. The bioactive constituents of Efossus zacatecasensis include ephedrine alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are thought to contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditional herbal preparations made from Efossus zacatecasensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
